note: source.url corrected to https://www.ul.com/services/energy-storage-system-testing-and-certification (verified live official UL Solutions page). CN equivalent updated: GB/T 44265-2024 (dedicated Na-ion national standard, enacted April 2024; CQC voluntary certification rule CQC13-464292-2025 announced September 2025) added; GB/T 51048-2025 (effective April 1, 2026, includes Na-ion design pathways) added. Prior UNVERIFIED on Na-ion national standard status is resolved. All fragment content reviewed and corrected.

source.url corrected to https://www.shopulstandards.com/ProductDetail.aspx?productId=UL1973_3_S_20220225 (correct UL 1973 3rd edition product page). UL 1973 3rd edition (Feb 2022) confirmed to explicitly cover sodium-ion cells — guidance on Na-ion requirements was added in this edition with equivalent test requirements to lithium-ion. Prior [UNVERIFIED] on Appendix E Na-ion coverage is resolved: coverage is confirmed. CN equivalent updated: GB/T 44265-2024 (dedicated Na-ion national standard, enacted April 2024) added; prior claim of no dedicated Na-ion standard is corrected. GB 38031-2020 updated to GB 38031-2025. T/CIAPS UNVERIFIED tag removed.

UL 9540A 6th edition confirmed published March 13, 2026 (ANSI/CAN/UL 9540A:2026). Standard expands to non-lithium chemistries including sodium-ion with mandatory LSFT Section 10. Prior UNVERIFIED on edition year corrected. CN equivalent UNVERIFIED on Na-ion national standard resolved: GB/T 44265-2024 (enacted April 2024) and CQC rule CQC13-464292-2025 added. mandatory_status cn updated to reflect confirmed standards.

NFPA 855 2026 edition confirmed published September 9, 2025 (current edition). Fragment updated to reference 2026 edition as current while noting 2023 edition remains in force in non-adopting jurisdictions. 2026 edition adds mandatory HMA for virtually all ESS; sodium batteries have 20 kWh per-compartment threshold (same as Li-ion); aligned with UL 9540A 6th ed mandatory LSFT. CN equivalent updated: GB 51048-2014 UNVERIFIED resolved — revised as GB/T 51048-2025 (issued December 31, 2025, effective April 1, 2026, now includes Na-ion design pathways). GB/T 44265-2024 added.

PHMSA NPRM 2026-02575 confirmed published February 10, 2026; proposes UN 3551 and UN 3552 in 49 CFR 172.101 with shippers directed to 49 CFR 173.185. Comment period confirmed closed April 13, 2026. Final rule confirmed NOT yet published as of June 2026. PHMSA enforcement discretion December 9, 2024 confirmed operative. UN 38.3 mandatory requirement confirmed. 49 CFR 173.185 section reference confirmed (same packaging instructions as lithium-ion). Gap and mandatory_status accurate. zh/zht gap text updated to remove residual UNVERIFIED tag and confirm specific dates.

GB/T 44496-2024 was wrong standard number (that is an automotive software standard). Corrected throughout to GB/T 44265-2024 (Technical Specifications for Sodium-Ion Battery in Electrical Energy Storage Power Stations, enacted April 2024). GB 51048-2014 updated to GB/T 51048-2025 (effective April 1, 2026, includes Na-ion design pathways). CQC voluntary certification rule CQC13-464292-2025 added. NFPA 855 2026 edition (published September 9, 2025) added to standards list. Prior UNVERIFIED on GB/T 44496-2024 effective date is resolved by correction of standard number.

GB/T 44496-2024 corrected to GB/T 44265-2024 throughout. GB 51048-2014 updated to GB/T 51048-2025 (effective April 1, 2026; explicitly includes sodium-battery technology pathways). UNVERIFIED tag on GB 51048 Na-ion applicability resolved — the 2025 revision expressly introduces Na-ion technology pathways. CN summary updated to remove UNVERIFIED. mandatory_status cn updated to correct standard numbers.
